Document:
# Networking On the station, devices need to communicate to each other to preform their functions. [textlink="Air alarms" link="ESAirAlarms"] need to talk to their respective devices, [textlink="doors" link="ESAirlocks"] need to be linked to form proper airlocks, and much more.
[color=red][bold]On ES, machine linking is not currently exposed for players to interact with and is slated to be reworked, although machines like the above still use it internally.[/bold][/color]
